# CIP-30-DeepLink — @fluxpointstudios/cip30-deeplink-client

> Reference TypeScript SDK for CIP-30-DeepLink (CIP-186): a deep-link wire protocol that lets a mobile dApp ask an installed Cardano wallet to run CIP-30 operations (connect, signTx, signData) over the OS URL handler — no relay, no WebView, no QR. The connect handshake is fail-closed: the wallet's response is Ed25519-signed and replay-bound, and the SDK refuses to seat a session unless it verifies.

## Install

`npm install @fluxpointstudios/cip30-deeplink-client` — one runtime dependency (tweetnacl); runs in the browser and Node.

## Core usage

A deep-link round-trip spans a page navigation, so call `resume()` first on every page load; `connect()` / `signTx()` navigate to the wallet and return via the redirect (never as a return value).

```ts
import { DeepLinkClient } from "@fluxpointstudios/cip30-deeplink-client";

const client = new DeepLinkClient({ wallet: "yuti", chain: "cardano:preprod", resolveTxHash });

const resumed = await client.resume();        // recover any pending response (run FIRST, every load)
if (resumed?.kind === "connect") { /* resumed.session: addresses, signingPublicKey, ... */ }
if (resumed?.kind === "signTx")  { /* resumed.result.witnessSet */ }

await client.connect({ name: "MyDapp", url: "https://mydapp.example" });  // navigates to the wallet
await client.signTx({ tx: cborHex });          // once connected
```

- `signTx` returns a witness set, not a signed tx — splice it into the body or assemble server-side.
- `commit = BLAKE2b-256(tx_body)`; wire `resolveTxHash` (MeshJS/Lucid/CSL) or pass `commit` per call.
- `wallet` sets the deep-link scheme `cip30dl-<wallet>`; pass `httpsPrefix` for universal-link wallets.

## Wallet support

Fail-closed — end-user signing needs a wallet that emits the signed connect: Gero (verified end-to-end), Yuti (wallet-side reference). You can build and test your whole integration without a wallet via the inspector + the bundled fake wallet.

## Links

- npm package + full README: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@fluxpointstudios/cip30-deeplink-client
- Source on GitHub: https://github.com/Flux-Point-Studios/cip30-deeplink-client
- Full machine-readable docs (one fetch): https://cip30-inspector.vercel.app/llms-full.txt
- CIP-186 specification (PR #1189): https://github.com/cardano-foundation/CIPs/pull/1189
- Interactive inspector: https://cip30-inspector.vercel.app
- Conformance kit + known-answer vectors: https://github.com/Flux-Point-Studios/cip30-deeplink-client/tree/main/conformance
- Yuti — wallet-side reference wallet: https://github.com/Flux-Point-Studios/yuti
